g.title: inv1
g.text: 1. For any hunk h with attribution A:
if h is COPIED → attribution A is preserved
if h is SPLIT → A is applied to each fragment
if h is DELETED → A is removed

g.title: inv4
g.text: range-diff is git's own commit matching.
No heuristic pairing. No ancestry guessing.
Git tells us exactly what mapped where.
